stage: Phase-2 co-carry decouple ablation (R-2026-06-C condition 5: the second independent line on base_robustness_control)
purpose: Eval-only, no-training ablation answering ONE question: is the co-carry base ego's near-perfect success COOPERATION-CONTINGENT (it needs the coupled partner actually coordinating) or COUPLING-TRIVIAL (it would succeed anyway at K=8000 with the coupling removed or the partner not acting)? The co-carry campaign's CONFOUNDED_BY_INCUMBENT_BRITTLENESS verdict rests on the base_robustness_control (base pair 1.000 with all six partners => n_genuine_drop_arm_b = 0), which the review board accepted with the condition that it is singly-sourced and was bug-corrupted on its first run. R1's decisive next observation is a decoupled-partner / removed-coupling ablation. A collapse under decoupling HARDENS the CONFOUNDED verdict (the control demonstrated cooperation); survival under decoupling UNDERMINES it (the control never demonstrated cooperation). Falsifiable both ways; pre-committed before any episode runs. This is the sibling of the base-probe's UPWARD stiffness sweep (K 8000 -> 512k), in the opposite direction: DOWN to zero, plus a partner-removed arm - the missing half of the dose-response.

governance.matched_pair_only: Cooperative-impedance ego + matched impedance partner (the 'base' config of the Rung-5 base_robustness_control); the ONLY thing varied is the coupling (stiffness down to zero) and, in one arm, the partner's ACTION stream (zeroed). No new partners, axes, tasks, or knobs.
governance.success_predicate_unchanged: The frozen joint predicate (placed AND level AND unstressed AND static AND settled) is NEVER weakened or changed; f_max, goal radius, tilt limit, and episode length are frozen at the base_robustness_control / base-probe values.
governance.immutability: Prior artifacts under spikes/results/** are immutable (I8) - this run writes ONLY the new directory spikes/results/cocarry/decouple_ablation/. No bump of chamber.comm.SCHEMA_VERSION (I9); this is a new JSON artifact type. Touches no Phase-1 / M10 code (I1).
governance.reuses: Existing harness (chamber.benchmarks.cocarry_ph.build_cooperative_ego / build_partner_seat / cluster_bootstrap_delta), the compliant freed-axis spring coupling (chamber.envs.cocarry.cocarry_coupling via make_cocarry_training_env drive_stiffness), the embodiment-invariant coupling-stress instrument (stress_measure='coupling'), the registered partner-ablation instrument (chamber.partners.ablation.PartnerAblatedZero, the same class the admission A2 cell used), and the pure post-hoc predicate chamber.envs.cocarry.evaluate_cocarry_success. Nothing is rebuilt.

provenance.author: fsafaei
provenance.amended: 2026-07-14, PRE-TAG (founder-directed): (1) verdict rule replaced - the pooled mean of C1/C2 is dropped (mean-pooling can average away a high-C2 triviality signal); primary contrast is C0 vs C2, COUPLING_TRIVIAL fires on EITHER decoupled cell, C1/C3 are the corroborating dose-response; (2) c0_reproduce_min 1.0 -> 0.90 (the exact C0 rate is always reported; the kill fires only below 0.90); (3) n 12 -> 20, seed block extended to [71000..71019]. No tag existed before this amendment; no episode has run.
adr: ADR-026 §Decision 1-2 (coupling-validity criterion + the joint success predicate, never weakened)
ADR-026 §Open-questions ('coupling stiffness is a task parameter, not a fixed constant')
provenance.convening: R-2026-06-C condition 5 (base_robustness_control is singly-sourced and was bug-corrupted on its first run; a thesis-bearing conclusion cannot rest on it alone). R1's decisive next observation: a decoupled-partner / removed-coupling ablation showing base success is cooperation-contingent, not coupling-trivial, at K=8000.
provenance.sibling_probe: spikes/results/cocarry/base_probe/cocarry_base_probe_prereg.json (tag prereg-cocarry-base-probe-2026-06-22): the UPWARD stiffness sweep; its K=8000 cell measured success 1.000 on seeds 70000-70011 (FEASIBLE_TRIVIAL).
provenance.single_arm_anchor: spikes/results/admission/cocarry-2026-07-05/admission_report.json check A2 (a2_single_arm; tag prereg-admission-cocarry-2026-07-05): partner fully removed/retracted (condition cocarry_single_arm_positive_control, partner_ablated_zero seat), success_mean 0.000 over 60 episodes (seeds 90000-90004 x 12). REFERENCED as the known single-arm ~0% anchor; NOT re-derived here. C2 differs from A2 by construction: in C2 the partner arm is PRESENT and coupled at K=8000 but emits zero actions - it isolates the partner's ACTION from the COUPLING.

fixed_base_config.partner: cocarry_impedance (matched partner seat; build_partner_seat, panda_partner) - except arm C2, where the partner seat is the registered zero-action instrument (partner_ablated_zero, action_dim 8): LIMP-BUT-COUPLED, distinct from the A2 'retracted' anchor
fixed_base_config.note: On main, make_cocarry_training_env's env-internal success flag gates at the wrist ceiling and is IGNORED. Success is computed POST-HOC for every episode via the pure chamber.envs.cocarry.evaluate_cocarry_success(...) on the recorded raw metrics (centroid, max_tilt, max_stress=coupling force, both_static) at the f_max above. The hand-built controllers ignore reward, so rollout physics are byte-identical regardless of the (unused) reward params. drive_stiffness=K (a float) selects the Rung-4b compliant freed-axis spring via chamber.envs.cocarry.cocarry_coupling: damping derives at the rig's fixed 0.1 ratio (K=0 => damping 0), force limit unbounded. K=0 means the spring transmits no force - the coupling is OFF; the bar is held by nothing but whatever the arms' grip frames happen to do.

seed_disjointness: Disjoint from EVERY prior co-carry seed set: Rung-2 S 10000- / V 20000-, Rung-3 measurement 30000-30011 / calibration 40000-, Rung-4 EH 50000- / 60000-, Rung-5 measurement 54000-, base_probe 70000-70011, Rung-4b 70010-70017, Rung-4d 80100-80105, Rung-4e search 81000-81003 / confirm 81100-81111, admission 90000-90006. The driver verifies disjointness in code against this table and prints the check before any rollout.

C0_coupled_anchor.expected: ~1.000 - must reproduce the base_robustness_control matched cell (and the base-probe K=8000 cell). Runs FIRST.
C0_coupled_anchor.stop_rule: If C0 success_rate < c0_reproduce_min (see tripwires), STOP (substrate drift) - do NOT proceed to C1-C3; report only.

C1_decoupled_spring_off.tests: Whether the coordination channel (the spring) is load-bearing. C1 IS the K=0 endpoint of the C3 down-sweep: each (K, seed) cell runs exactly once and the K=0 cell is reported both as C1 and as the C3 endpoint (no duplicated episodes). Founder revision 2026-07-14: C1 is NOT part of the primary contingent contrast (that is C0 vs C2); it feeds the COUPLING_TRIVIAL arm (C1 >= 0.90 = the base wins with no coupling at all, a trivial-solve) and, with C3, the corroborating coupling dose-response (expected to drop too). A C1-only failure is WEAKER evidence of cooperation-contingency: at K=0 the shared bar is unsupported (nothing transmits force from either gripper), so collapse is mechanically expected regardless of coordination.

C2_partner_removed.partner: partner_ablated_zero (registered instrument; action_dim 8; zero pd_joint_delta_pos action stream = the arm holds its ready pose and never cooperates): LIMP-BUT-COUPLED - the coupling stays PRESENT at K=8000, only the cooperation is removed. Distinct from the A2 'retracted' anchor, where the partner is physically removed.
C2_partner_removed.tests: THE PRIMARY INSTRUMENT for R1's 'coupling-trivial at K=8000': cooperation is removed at the FIXED task stiffness, so the bar remains mechanically supported and only the partner's coordinated action is ablated. Anchored against the admission A2 single-arm ~0% (partner retracted) - referenced, not re-derived.

C3_down_sweep.tests: Dose-response: locates the K at which base success falls off - the mirror image of the base-probe's upward sweep. The K=8000 cell is C0; the K=0 cell is C1. Reported as the K dose-response CURVE (context / corroboration, not gated).
C3_down_sweep.method: Real rollouts of the pair at each K (20 seeds), recording per-step instantaneous trajectories (tilt_deg, coupling stress, centroid) plus per-episode metrics, exactly as the base probe did.

estimator.per_episode_success: chamber.envs.cocarry.evaluate_cocarry_success on the re-read committed per-episode JSONL (never in-memory values) at the frozen f_max / goal radius / tilt limit.
estimator.per_cell_ci: C0 / C1 / C2 are each reported as success_rate with a seed-bootstrap two-sided 95% percentile CI (resample the 20 seed clusters with replacement; n_boot 10000; RNG via concerto.training.seeding.derive_substream('cocarry.decouple_ablation.rate_bootstrap', root_seed=0) - P6). C3 is reported as the K dose-response curve (per-K success_rate + CI; context, not gated).
estimator.primary_contrast: C0 vs C2 (founder revision 2026-07-14, replacing the earlier pooled {C1, C2} draft - mean-pooling can average away a high-C2 triviality signal): gap = C0 success_rate - C2 success_rate. CI via the existing seed-cluster bootstrap chamber.benchmarks.cocarry_ph.cluster_bootstrap_delta (reference = C0 per-seed successes, single teammate = C2; n_boot 10000, alpha 0.05, root_seed 0, substream 'cocarry.rung3.bootstrap'): the decision rule reads the one-sided 95% LOWER bound (pooled_ci_lower_one_sided, which equals the single-cell bound here).
estimator.corroboration: C1 (the K=0 endpoint) and the full C3 down-sweep success rates + CIs are reported as the coupling dose-response (expected to drop too); C1 additionally feeds the COUPLING_TRIVIAL arm. Corroboration is REPORTED, never substituted into the primary contrast, and never gates.

decision_rule.band_edges_note: Reuses the program's pre-registered band edges 0.10 / 0.90 (the base-probe success bands). Stated once, two-sided, before any episode runs; founder-directed amendment 2026-07-14 (primary contrast revised from the pooled {C1, C2} draft to C0 vs C2; C1/C3 = corroborating dose-response; COUPLING_TRIVIAL fires on EITHER decoupled cell). LOCKED at tag-cut; never tuned to the data.
decision_rule.rationale: C2 (cooperation removed at the FIXED task stiffness K=8000, limp-but-coupled) is the PRIMARY instrument for R1's 'coupling-trivial at K=8000' question: it ablates exactly the partner's coordinated action while leaving the bar mechanically supported. C1/C3 (coupling removed / swept down) are the corroborating dose-response. A C1-only failure is WEAKER evidence: at K=0 the shared bar is unsupported, so collapse is mechanically expected regardless of coordination. Mean-pooling C1 with C2 was dropped because it can average away a high-C2 triviality signal.
decision_rule.COUPLING_TRIVIAL: iff C2 success_rate >= 0.90 OR C1 success_rate >= 0.90 - the base wins with no functioning partner, or with no coupling at all; either is a trivial-solve. Takes PRECEDENCE over the contingent arm: any decoupled trivial-solve invalidates the control regardless of the other cell. => base_robustness_control is INVALID as a cooperation demonstration and the co-carry CONFOUNDED headline must be re-interpreted.
decision_rule.COOPERATION_CONTINGENT: iff C0 success_rate >= 0.90 AND C2 success_rate <= 0.10 AND the (C0 - C2) gap's one-sided 95% lower confidence bound >= 0.50 (and no trivial-solve fired). C1 and the C3 down-sweep are reported alongside as the corroborating coupling dose-response (expected to drop too). => The base ego needs the coupled partner actually coordinating: the base_robustness_control is a VALID cooperation demonstration and the co-carry CONFOUNDED_BY_INCUMBENT_BRITTLENESS verdict HOLDS (hardened by a second independent line).
decision_rule.INDETERMINATE: otherwise - report the SPLIT (e.g. C2 low, C1 mid; or C2 low but not <= 0.10; or an under-powered gap bound), never collapse it; propose the next cheap discriminator, do NOT self-authorize it.

artifact_vs_real_classification.note: Same thresholds as the base probe (its committed artifact-vs-real rule), applied per cell for reporting. A DOWN-sweep is expected to be numerically benign (the blow-up wall was HIGH K); any non-finite value nonetheless triggers the tripwire STOP below rather than a silent classification.

tripwires.prereg_first: The driver refuses to run unless the working tree is clean (exit 7, DIRTY_TREE_EXIT_CODE; chamber-eval-style --allow-dirty exists for re-runs over already-written results but has NO effect on the prereg check) AND the on-disk prereg blob SHA matches the blob stored at the SSH-signed annotated tag prereg-cocarry-decouple-ablation-2026-07-11 (exit 4, PREREG_MISMATCH_EXIT_CODE - the chamber-eval gate, no bypass). No episode runs before the tag exists.
tripwires.c0_reproduce_note: The exact C0 success rate is ALWAYS reported. The substrate-drift kill fires only if C0 < 0.90 (founder amendment 2026-07-14; was exact-reproduction 1.0): C0 < 0.90 cannot anchor either verdict arm and contradicts every prior identical-config observation (admission A1 60/60, base-probe K=8000 12/12, base_robustness_control 6x n, all 1.000) => STOP (exit 3), report only, do not proceed to C1-C3.
tripwires.non_finite: Any non-finite (NaN/Inf) tilt / coupling stress / centroid in any episode => STOP (exit 3) and report; never silently extend or classify past it.

compute_cap.note: 7 down-sweep cells x 20 seeds (C0 at K=8000 and C1 at K=0 are the sweep endpoints) + C2 x 20 = 160 episodes. Cap breach => STOP (exit 3) and report.

tripwires.no_scope_additions: Run ONLY the conditions above. If the design appears to need a change (predicate, f_max, grid, seeds, partner construction), STOP and surface it - never self-authorize.
